column6: Same number on both Prox/Leaf sides of card.
Cards: 50d8-Lk10031 = DESFire EV2 LEAF Smart Cards with NWH custom keys and Partner's Common keys

Newton-Wellesley Hospital is part of the Partner's Hospital transition strategy. Part of Lk10031 is unique to MGH, and part is common to other Partner's Hospitals.

Kc1 - Kc8: Unique NWH keys

Kc9 - Kc16: Common Partner's Hospital keys

Reader's programmed with CNW1 will only have Kc1 (NWH unique). They will NOT have Kc9 (common Partner's key)

column2:
Filter out: Low frequency credentials of W36-8 format, FC of 31, BID's greater than or equal to 2,000,000. 

Note: This should filter out all new Partner's hospital LF credentials

CNW1-LK10031-POC1

If CNW2-LK10031-POC1 is approved by the customer, CNW1 is approved aswell.
